entity.label: Jabez
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place inhabited by several families of the scribes (1 Chr. 2:55).

nodes.label: Jabez
nodes.description: A place inhabited by several families of the scribes (1 Chr. 2:55).

verses.text: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
